reviews.review_title: Stopped loading after June 11 app update
reviews.review_description: After June update of this app it has  failed to load I found this game great, upgraded my avatar . The Chinese that could speak English were very helpful most of the instructions were in English, some not . I would really like to resume game play ,Anyone have any ideas ,I have tried everything in the Google search even default setting of the meta quest 3 ,everything is up to date
I was attracted to the trailer of this game and immediately downloaded it. The gameplay is very innovative, and there are also many players playing BOSS online, which feels very fun
I just downloaded this new game and after playing for a while, I found that there are many people inside. Everyone is very friendly, and it feels great!
Grab your weapons and gear up for battle in 'theothershore'! The variety of weapons and enemies keeps the action fresh and exciting.
I am American and it only speaks in Chinese and the graphics sucked!
Things that might have made this happen i denied all permissions when it asked. im gonna wait till 2mor and record  that it won't start for my youtube channel

developer_response.body: I'm very sorry, there was a problem with the server a few days ago, and the problem has been resolved. You can try entering again. Welcome to enter again. Thank you

reviews.review_description: I love the innovative mechanics in The Other Shore. It truly feels like you're in another world.

reviews.review_title: This game has very high playability
reviews.review_description: theothershore is a highly playable game with four professions to choose from, all of which are great and have different skills. I now team up with other players every day to kill bosses. I have reached level 40 and will continue to play.
